title: helianthemum × mariano-salvatoris
intro: Helianthemum × mariano-salvatoris, also known as the Mariano-Salvador Rock Rose, is a hybrid species of flowering plant belonging to the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum × mariano-salvatoris include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular choice for topical applications. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, salves, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
